stemHtml: A German airline must establish a written operator security programme and:

options.a: implement and maintain it, in compliance with the national civil aviation security programme of Germany.
options.b: implement and maintain it, in compliance with the European aviation security programme of ICAO.
options.c: implement and maintain it, in compliance with the European aviation security programme of EASA.
options.d: deliver it to the competent authority, in compliance with IATA's international security programme.
